name: Portfolio About
description: Bio, skills, and contact pages for a personal portfolio. Professional yet personal presentation with an editorial identity summary, capability cards, and a split contact surface.

page_briefs.about: Brand hero followed by an editorial identity summary. The identity panel should use a compact portrait or monogram, strong name/title hierarchy, one short biography, and aligned metadata facts such as location and email. The overall feel should be calm, premium, and intentionally authored rather than dashboard-like.
page_briefs.skills: Capability card grid displaying skill areas in one to three medium-width columns. Each card has a category icon, a strong title, a short framing paragraph, and a compact supporting list of two to four focused capabilities or proficiency badges. The page should feel editorial and airy, not like a dense dashboard widget wall.
page_briefs.contact-page: Split contact surface with the primary form in the dominant column and a narrower companion panel for contact details, response expectations, and social links. The details panel stays top-aligned and compact rather than stretching to the full height of the form. Contact channels should use aligned icon chips plus label/value rows, and the social links should read as explicit actions rather than loose text.

shells.top-nav-main: Fixed top navigation bar with main content area below
